ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the transaction */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (Buy/Sell) */,
  "count_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction (negative for buys) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "settled_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction is settled */,
  "trade_strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade strategy used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_trade_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* The name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Biotechnology, Software) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol for the holding */,
  "count_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost per share of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "min_shares" INTEGER /* Minimum number of shares required for the transaction type */,
  "max_shares" INTEGER /* Maximum number of shares allowed for the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market data entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol for which data is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the rule is currently active */,
  "min_transaction_amount" REAL /* Minimum total amount for the transaction */,
  "max_transaction_amount" REAL /* Maximum total amount for the transaction */,
  "min_shares" INTEGER /* Minimum number of shares for the transaction */,
  "max_shares" INTEGER /* Maximum number of shares for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., created, approved, rejected) */,
  "system_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the system (e.g., auto-approved, flagged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Trader, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the compliance officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the compliance officer */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the compliance officer was hired */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last compliance review conducted by the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_compliance" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance check */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being checked */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance officer who performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the compliance officer during the review */,
  "review_duration" INTEGER /* Duration taken for the compliance review (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_compliance_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_compliance_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES compliance_officers ("officer_id")
)
